channel.title: Projects on David Bedoya | Audio & AI/ML Engineering
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on David Bedoya | Audio & AI/ML Engineering

item.title: A lo Paisa: Agentic Voice-to-Voice Workflow
item.description: An AI-driven audio transformation pipeline adapting spoken sentences into Antioquia's idiomatic expressions using STT, LLMs, and TTS.
